sprints.name: v5.4 — Forge Autonomy
sprints.ceo_brief: Last human-directed sprint. 100x spend. After this ships, Claude executes autonomously to v6.0. Five gates must pass.

items.title: Multi-Agent Orchestration Engine
items.description: WorkflowRunner with YAML DSL: parallel fan-out, sequential pipelines, conditional branching. Cost-budgeted per workflow. POST /api/v5/workflows/run. Gate: 10-agent parallel workflow completes without deadlock.

items.title: Autonomous Sprint Loop
items.description: SprintPlanner (reads backlog+metrics→generates sprint JSON), SprintRunner (executes items via ProposalExecutor), SprintEvaluator (runs tests, compares metrics), SprintPromoter (bumps version, writes records, queues next). Auto-approval mode. Gate: full dry-run completes autonomously.

items.title: Cost Governance at 100x
items.description: BudgetEnforcer with hard ceilings (per-sprint, per-day, per-agent). ModelSelector auto-selects tier by task complexity. KillSwitch halts all execution on ceiling breach. GET /api/v5/budget, POST /api/v5/budget/config. Gate: runaway simulation halts in <30s.

items.title: Self-Correction Engine
items.description: GitCheckpoint creates branch per sprint. RegressionDetector compares pre/post test counts. DeadEndTracker deprioritizes after 3 failures. Guardrails block destructive ops (delete packages, remove tests) without elevated approval. Gate: deliberate regression auto-reverts.

items.title: Sprint Observability
items.description: ExecutionLog records every agent call, proposal, approval, test result. SprintReporter generates structured summaries (planned/executed/passed/failed/cost). GET /api/v5/execution-log, /api/v5/sprint-reports. Dashboard sprint page with full v5.5→v6.0 audit trail.

items.title: Strategic Backlog Seeding
items.description: Seed .agentforge/backlog/ with remaining v5.3 P1/P2 items as structured backlog entries + v6-north-star.md. System knows what to work toward autonomously.

items.title: Autonomous Sprint Dry Run
items.description: Execute a full sprint cycle in dry-run mode: SprintPlanner generates sprint, SprintRunner executes (dryRun:true), SprintEvaluator passes, SprintPromoter would bump version. Full cycle <10 min. COMPLETED: 32ms.

items.title: v5.4 Release
items.description: Bumped to 5.4.0, marked sprint complete. 2914 tests passing (206 new autonomy tests). All 5 autonomy gates passed.

autonomyGates.costGovernance: PASSED — KillSwitchError fires on daily limit breach
